raw_action_dict.reasoning: Track curves right ahead but waypoint analysis shows delta +42.7° — car heading is -49.6° while track runs nearly due east, so strong left steering needed to align with the eastward track.
knowledge: After waypoint 106, track runs nearly due east at y≈0.68 — long straight ahead
Car heading is around -49° but track is nearly 0° (east) — need sustained left steering to align
Positive delta = steer left (positive steering_angle), negative = steer right
At delta +30-50°, use steering_angle=+20 at speed 1.0
Car is left of center (0.20m) — within safe bounds at track width 0.76m
Track loops south around waypoints 103-115 then straightens east
Oversteer warning: once delta drops below 10°, reduce to smallest valid angle
Previous +20° steering at speed 1.0 was correct — continue same action
Waypoints 107-119 all at y≈0.68, x increasing — long eastward straight
Watch for transition: once heading reaches ~0°, reduce steering to avoid oscillation
